caption.full:
Wai Ching Ho, known for playing Madame Gao, has died at 82.

The veteran actress passed away at age 82. She played the villainous Madame Gao across three Marvel Netflix series: Daredevil, Iron Fist, and The Defenders. Wai Ching Ho landed her first film role in 1990 in the Robin Williams flick Cadillac Man.

What moment of Madame Gao or her work will you remember most?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

youtube.title: Daredevil Star Wai Ching Ho Dies at 82
youtube.description:
Daredevil actress Wai Ching Ho has died at age 82. Co-star Peter Shinkoda shared a photo from the series, remembering her. She played Madame Gao across 'Daredevil', 'Iron Fist', and 'The Defenders', and also appeared in 'Hustlers' and 'Cadillac Man'.
